response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep systems expertise in event-driven architectures, and hands-on work with agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks clear evidence of leading AI systems in regulated fintech environments, scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for a CTO role in this domain.
strengths: Proven experience building event-driven, distributed systems with real-time data handling
Direct exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP frameworks in production
Strong technical leadership through open-source projects and cross-functional engineering culture building
concerns: No demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulatory compliance systems
Lack of evidence scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal visibility into LLM evaluation, production ML pipelines, or financial-grade reliability engineering
